item.title: Global buyout funds to exit China’s data centres with final $1bn deal
item.description: Princeton Digital Group’s sale process caps foreign retreat from the country’s sensitive digital infrastructure

item.title: Estée Lauder and Puig end merger talks to create beauty powerhouse
item.description: Shares in US cosmetics giant jump 11.5% in post-market trading as investors welcome end of discussions

item.title: SpaceX readies high-stakes test launch of latest Starship spacecraft
item.description: Elon Musk’s space conglomerate warned in IPO filing that its strategy is ‘highly dependent’ on the massive rocket

item.title: Walmart says customers are rationing petrol as Iran war hits wallets
item.description: US retail giant’s shares plunge after saying it absorbed higher fuel expenses to hold down prices for consumers

item.title: The oil reserves dwindle
item.description: What happens when there are no more stockpiles?

item.title: Trump abruptly postpones AI order after White House infighting
item.description: President refuses to approve order hours before planned signing due to fears US innovators will lose out to China

item.title: TfL voices concern over robotaxis as ministers invite bids
item.description: Officials say more work is needed to show self-driving vehicles will bring ‘net benefit on safety’

item.title: ‘Fast entry’ SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic IPOs to ignite Wall St trading frenzy
item.description: Passive investors set to dump billions of shares to make way for new stocks

item.title: BT is finally getting on top of its altnet threat
item.description: UK telecom has put up a fight as its rivals slow their rate of sprawl

item.title: Goldman Sachs eclipses Morgan Stanley’s Michael Grimes on SpaceX IPO
item.description: Celebrated tech banker lost influence over Elon Musk’s blockbuster listing amid stint in Trump administration

item.title: Morrisons blames UK government policy for shutting 100 lossmaking stores
item.description: Closures are latest cost-cutting step by UK supermarket chain

item.title: Air France, Airbus found guilty of involuntary manslaughter in 2009 Rio-Paris crash
item.description: Both groups to appeal ruling after Paris court finds the companies responsible for negligence that led to accident

item.title: Crypto platforms rush to launch derivatives linked to SpaceX
item.description: Binance among exchanges to offer so-called perpetual futures to speculate on price of rocket company’s upcoming IPO

item.title: UK business activity fell for first time in more than a year in May
item.description: PMI figures reflect domestic political uncertainty adding to fallout from Middle East war

item.title: AJ Bell boss warns of Isa reform ‘black hole’
item.description: Investment site says proposed rules could deter first-time investors

item.title: Spotify targets high-spending superfans with AI-generated music
item.description: Streamer and Universal Music Group strike licensing deal for a paid add-on tool within Spotify’s app

item.title: Leaseholders pay for ‘years of underfunding’ in UK’s ageing housing stock
item.description: Average service charge in buildings that are more than 25 years old and six storeys tall hits £7,300 per year

item.title: Six takeaways from Musk’s 200,000-word planetary vision
item.description: Elon Musk’s rockets-to-AI conglomerate lays out its ambitions

item.title: Swiss giant battery developer taps UK start-up to feed AI power boom
item.description: World’s largest vanadium flow battery project selects Invinity Energy Systems to meet data centre energy demands

item.title: Post Office replaces Fujitsu after Horizon scandal
item.description: Accenture and OneView Commerce win £500mn contracts to run and create alternative to notorious IT system

item.title: UK energy regulator warns traders against gaming the interconnector market
item.description: Analysts warn of risk of traders holding ‘market to ransom’ by hoarding capacity on electricity import-export lines

item.title: London mayor blocks the Met’s £50mn Palantir deal
item.description: Mayor’s Office for Policing and Crime identifies ‘clear and serious’ breaches of procurement rules

item.title: Nvidia fails to dazzle investors despite lifting dividends
item.description: Shares in world’s most valuable company steady after announcing better than expected revenue and forecasts

item.title: EasyJet to launch loyalty scheme to woo unhappy British Airways flyers
item.description: Budget airline says UK flag carrier’s overhaul had made its programme too ‘elite’

item.title: BYD in talks with Christian Horner over entering F1
item.description: EV maker intends to meet senior officials from the motorsport after discussions with former Red Bull Racing chief

item.title: Musk, SpaceX and Muscovite fever dreams
item.description: Tech titans are in many ways the intellectual heirs of the Soviet space programme

item.title: How to make sense of SpaceX’s nonsensical valuation
item.description: The market has never before had to price a stock so speculative yet so large

item.title: Stellantis to invest €60bn and launch 60 new models under plan to revive carmaker
item.description: European group will partner with Chinese rivals and keep all of its factories under strategy laid out by chief executive

item.title: US to invest $2bn in nine quantum computing companies
item.description: Beneficiaries include start-up backed by firm with links to the Trump family

item.title: Closing tax loophole for oil groups will fund cost of living package, says Reeves
item.description: Chancellor sets out sweeping package of measures aimed at helping businesses and families
